S.FORM: IG:zyfz_hsan Itini i 5 00 S, 120 00 E, noAsiya ko Indonesia. Polong no sekalay i 1,904,569 sq km "saka 15 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 1,811,569 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 93,000 sq km " Polong i 258,316,051 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 31.20%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 51.70%, malo no roma to a sera 17.10%. siyoto O (((Jakarta)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakafalo 17 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Joko Widodo , patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 20 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: i*:*jf*_ńßsan itini i * ** s, *** ** …ô, no~uasija ko~u in…¨~…ģo~un…ôsia. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i *,***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, *,***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, **,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i ***,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((*akarta)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakafa…ĺo~u ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i *o~uko~u wi…¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~u , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: IG:zyfz_hsan Itini i 5 00 S, 120 00 E, noAsiya ko Indonesia. Polong no sekalay i 1,904,569 sq km "saka 15 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 1,811,569 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 93,000 sq km " Polong i 258,316,051 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 31.20%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 51.70%, malo no roma to a sera 17.10%. siyoto O (((Jakarta)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakafalo 17 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Joko Widodo , patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 20 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
